name: Do I need a lawyer for AI legal advice gone wrong in Chicago?
description: Yes—AI risks + privilege issues make lawyer essential.[1][4]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer for AI legal advice gone wrong in Chicago?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes—AI risks + privilege issues make lawyer essential.[1][4]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Yes, especially with discoverability risks.[1][4] Self-representing amplifies *Heppner* harms, as pro se lacks privilege claims.[1][3] Illinois courts likely follow federal AI rulings.

**Key factors:**
- Privilege harder without counsel.
- Hallucinations common (1/6+).[4]
- Costly mistakes in discovery.

Hire experienced in tech evidence; free consults common. Don't pro se complex AI-tainted cases.[4] Act before evidence used against you.
